title: Fushia Twilight Hand Dyed Baby Alpaca Yarn
description: This lovely hand dyed yarn is 100% baby alpaca and is as soft as can be! It is hand dyed in fushias, purples, grays and white. There is 108 yards per skein in this bulky weight yarn. Only 3 skeins of this limited dye lot were made!

title: Spearmint Blush Hand Dyed Baby Alpaca Yarn
description: This lovely hand dyed yarn is 100% baby alpaca and is as soft as can be! It is hand dyed in spearmint green and peach blush. There is 108 yards per skein in this bulky weight yarn. Only 3 skeins of this limited dye lot were made!

title: Alpaca Dryer Ball
description: Did you know dryer sheets are one of the most chemically laden household objects? Our all-natural, hypoallergenic alpaca dryer balls are an excellent, environmentally friendly alternative! They bounce around the dryer helping to soften fabric, reduce static, wrinkles and drying time! For the best results, you want at least 2 dryer balls and up to 5! (We use 4 here!) If you like scented things, you can place a few drops of your favorite essential oil on the balls occasionally! Dryer balls are sold individually.
